title: alsine tenuifolia var. vaillantiana
intro: Alsine tenuifolia var. vaillantiana, also known as Creeping Cinquefoil or Vaillant's Alsine, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The plant's health benefits include treating urinary tract infections, reducing inflammation and pain, and promoting digestive health. Alsine tenuifolia var. vaillantiana can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of urinary issues and promote overall well-being.
